text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Just now, a journalist interviewing me<n>said she
admired how I "always live up to<n>expectations."

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Many from my family also expect me to<n>achieve
our long-standing dream... To be<n>honest, I never
imagined I'd be running<n>under such pressure...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Which makes winning all the more<n>worthwhile.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I want to give everyone a chance to see<n>this
diamond shining in first place. ♪
